strengths: Complete mastery of required tech stack (TypeScript, React, Node.js, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS) demonstrated across multiple production roles at scale
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD, and testing-first development directly aligned with stated architectural values and clean code interests
Full-stack platform thinking across database design, backend services, frontend UI, and DevOps infrastructure—demonstrates holistic system understanding
concerns: Staff-level seniority for entry-level role creates material retention risk and potential misalignment on responsibility growth trajectory
PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned in experience; background shows MongoDB and MySQL but not the specifically-required PostgreSQL
No prior renewable energy or construction technology domain experience—requires learning new vertical and stakeholder context from scratch

key_factors.factor: Core tech stack mastery (TypeScript, React, Node.js, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS)
Software craftsmanship and testing culture alignment
Overqualification creating retention and motivation risk

response.justification: Bogdan brings mastery of the full required tech stack and demonstrates deep commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD, and testing—directly aligned with stated architectural values. His decade of production experience building complex distributed systems provides substantial technical foundation. While his Staff-level title raises legitimate retention and engagement concerns, his career pattern of rapidly acquiring expertise across disparate domains (geospatial systems, direct mail at scale, real-time data platforms) demonstrates strong learning capability and adaptability essential for domain entry.
